ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "turning_pro_year" INTEGER /* Year the player turned professional */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "player_height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "player_weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "player_handicap" REAL /* Player's handicap */,
  "player_bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the player */,
  "player_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's profile image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the tournament is held */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the tournament took place */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "prize_pool" REAL /* Total prize pool for the tournament */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course where the tournament is held */,
  "number_of_holes" INTEGER /* Total number of holes in the tournament */,
  "number_of_rounds" INTEGER /* Total number of rounds in the tournament */,
  "tourney_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournaments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistics belong to */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the statistics are associated with */,
  "rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds played by the player in the tournament */,
  "rank_this_week" INTEGER /* Rank of the player this week */,
  "rank_last_week" INTEGER /* Rank of the player last week */,
  "greens_hit" INTEGER /* Greens hit in regulation */,
  "holes" INTEGER /* Number of holes played */,
  "relative_to_par" REAL /* Player's score relative to par */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the statistics were recorded */,
  "measure" TEXT /* Measurement type (e.g., gir_pct) */,
  "putts_per_round" REAL /* Average putts per round */,
  "fairways_hit" INTEGER /* Number of fairways hit */,
  "fairways_hit_pct" REAL /* Percentage of fairways hit */,
  "putts_per_hole" REAL /* Average putts per hole */,
  "scrambling_pct" REAL /* Percentage of successful scrambles */,
  "bogey_free_rounds" INTEGER /* Number of bogey-free rounds */,
  "sand_saves" INTEGER /* Number of successful sand saves */,
  "sand_save_pct" REAL /* Percentage of successful sand saves */,
  "driving_distance" REAL /* Average driving distance */,
  "driving_accuracy_pct" REAL /* Percentage of driving accuracy */,
  "three_putt_avoidance_pct" REAL /* Percentage of three-putt avoidance */,
  "strokes_gained_total" REAL /* Total strokes gained */,
  "strokes_gained_tee_to_green" REAL /* Strokes gained from tee to green */,
  "strokes_gained_putting" REAL /* Strokes gained putting */,
  "strokes_gained_approach" REAL /* Strokes gained approach */,
  "strokes_gained_around_the_green" REAL /* Strokes gained around the green */,
  "strokes_gained_off_the_tee" REAL /* Strokes gained off the tee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the metric measures */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric */,
  "metric_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "user_last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* A brief biography of the user */,
  "user_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile image */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the statistics */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the statistics being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistics were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access (timestamp) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES player_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each golf course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the golf course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the golf course */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Total par for the course */,
  "course_length" INTEGER /* Total length of the course in yards */,
  "course_difficulty_rating" REAL /* Difficulty rating of the course */,
  "course_slope_rating" INTEGER /* Slope rating of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the course */,
  "course_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the course's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_metrics" (
  "tournament_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament metric entry */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament associated with the metric */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being tracked */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric for the tournament */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric */,
  "metric_description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_metrics_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which data is collected */,
  "year_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the year */,
  "year_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the year */,
  "year_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the year (e.g., any significant events) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)
